type_definitions.name: TdddLayerBinding
type_definitions.description: Binding of a TDDD-enabled layer from architecture-rules.json. Used by verify_catalogue_spec_refs (CLI layer) to enumerate catalogue files per layer. The catalogue_spec_signal_enabled() accessor controls which layers participate in ref-integrity verification. Type contract is unchanged; it is referenced here to anchor IN-03 at the infrastructure boundary.

type_definitions.name: PlanArtifactRefsError
type_definitions.description: Error type from the plan_artifact_refs verifier in infrastructure::verify. This type is referenced to document the error taxonomy in the infrastructure::verify module cluster where latest_track.rs and view_freshness.rs live. Variant structure is unchanged; the changes to those modules are free-function body changes that produce VerifyOutcome.
